title: Billing
subtitle: Your subscription and renewal dates.
loadError: Could not load billing details. Try again in a moment.

summary.inactive: Subscribe below to turn on TUFStellar benefits.
summary.activeRenewing: Renews automatically on the date shown.
summary.activeCancelling: Cancelling — you keep benefits until the access end date. Use Resubscribe to undo.
summary.checkoutPending: Payment received — we are finishing activation.

hints.activating: Almost ready — cancellation will be available shortly.

actions.subscribeDescription: Opens checkout in a new tab.
actions.resubscribeDescription: Turns billing back on for your current plan.
actions.cancelDescription: Access stays until this billing period ends.
actions.noneNeeded: Nothing to change here right now.

history.title: Recent activity
history.subtitle: Newest first. Reference IDs help support match a charge.

toasts.checkoutOpened: Complete payment in the new tab. Allow pop-ups if it did not open.
toasts.checkoutError: Could not start checkout. Please try again.
toasts.checkoutBlockedActive: You already have an active subscription. Billing details were refreshed.
toasts.checkoutUseResubscribe: Your plan is set to end — use Resubscribe instead of starting a new checkout.
toasts.subscriptionNotReady: Subscription is still activating. Refresh and try again shortly.
toasts.cancelRequested: Subscription cancelled. Benefits stay until the period ends.
toasts.cancelError: Could not cancel. Please try again.
toasts.resubscribeSuccess: Renewals are on again for your current subscription.
toasts.resubscribeError: Could not resume renewals. Please try again.

callback.title: Finalizing your subscription
callback.waiting: Confirming your payment with our system…
callback.statusNotDone: Payment was not completed. You can try again from the billing page.
